query:
SELECT lessonId, COUNT(*) as question_count, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN questionType = 'multiple_choice' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as mc_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN questionType = 'short_answer' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sa_count
FROM quiz_questions 
WHERE lessonId BETWEEN 690001 AND 690010 
GROUP BY lessonId 
ORDER BY lessonId;
